steps.title: Isolate the term with 4x
steps.content:
To find an equation with the same solution, subtract 6 from both sides of $4x + 6 = 18$:
$$4x + 6 - 6 = 18 - 6$$
$$4x = 12$$

steps.title: Identify the equivalent equation
steps.content: The simplified form $4x = 12$ is equivalent to the original equation. This is choice C. That matches choice C — C is correct.
